decisions.question: Classification trigger: when and how does Phase 1 add the adversarial lead?
decisions.chosen: Option B — Label + conversation signal (two-gate trigger)

decisions.question: Adversarial lead design and 'don't pursue' outcome (coupled pair)
decisions.chosen: Reporter frame + Rejection Record crystallize type + standalone produce path

decisions.question: Eval rubric for honest vs reflexive assessment
decisions.chosen: Composite A+C+D (fixture ground truth + anti-reflexivity + confidence calibration)
